page.title: Boat Party Marbella 2026: Stag, Hen & Group Charters (10–40 guests)

data.hero_alt: Large white party yacht docked at marina in summer sunlight
data.meta_description: Boat party Marbella from €1,200 for half-day: stag, hen, birthday and corporate charters on yachts and catamarans for 10–40 guests. DJ, ice tubs and party hosts available.
data.summary: Group party charter spoke: stag, hen, birthday and corporate options, capacity by boat, extras (DJ, BYOB, catering), prices and timing.
key_facts: Boat party Marbella half-day from €1,200 for a 16 m yacht with 16 guests
Full-day party yacht charters €2,400–€4,500 depending on size and DJ setup
Maximum capacity: 12 day guests on standard 18 m, 30+ on dedicated party catamarans, 40 on commercial party boats
Standard 14:00-18:00 slot is the most popular for stag/hen groups
BYOB welcomed; pro DJ + speaker system add-on €350; mid-cruise tender to a beach club extra

faq.q: How much is a boat party in Marbella?
faq.a: A 4-hour half-day for 16 guests on a 16 m motor yacht costs €1,200–€1,800 depending on season — works out to roughly €75–€110 per person, cheaper than most Puerto Banús beach clubs. A full day on a 22 m party yacht for 25 guests runs €2,800–€4,500. Larger commercial party boats up to 40 guests start at €1,500 for a half-day shared format.

faq.q: What size group fits on which boat?
faq.a: Up to 8: any 10–12 m motor yacht works. 10–16: a 16–18 m motor yacht or 45 ft catamaran. 18–25: a 22 m+ yacht or a 50 ft commercial catamaran. 25–40: a dedicated commercial party boat with bar and DJ booth. Above 40 you need to split into two boats — we coordinate.

Yes on private charters — most operators welcome BYO and provide ice and cups. Commercial party boats (40-person format) often run a paid bar instead. Cava and prosecco travel best; spirits and mixers are fine; kegs are usually a no. Whoever organises the BYO is responsible for being sensible — drunk-overboard liability is real.

Every private charter has a Bluetooth speaker setup good for ~12 guests. For larger groups or a real party feel, add a pro DJ + dedicated speaker system for €350 (half day) or €600 (full day). Live music and saxophonists are bookable separately for €400–€600. Skipper can suggest local DJs who know the boat layout.

Customisable per booking: jet-ski sessions tied to the charter (€60/person), inflatable water-toy package (banana, donut, paddleboards — usually included), photographer (€200/hour), tender ride to a beach club for paid entry to Nikki Beach or Ocean Club. We coordinate the package — just send a WhatsApp.

data.body_html:
Marbella's party-yacht scene is built around the 14:00–18:00 slot in July and August. You board with the group, the skipper runs west along the Golden Mile, drops anchor at Río Verde or Río Real for a swim-and-music stop, optionally tenders the group to Nikki Beach for a paid entry, then returns just in time to clean up and hit the marina restaurants. Prices start at €1,200 for a half-day private charter.

Boat party Marbella prices 2026

BoatGuests4 h half-dayFull day 8 h
16-18 m motor yachtup to 12-16€1,200-1,800€2,200-2,800
45 ft party catamaranup to 16-20€1,400-1,900€2,400-3,200
22 m+ luxury yachtup to 12 (day)€2,200-2,800€3,200-4,500
50 ft commercial catamaranup to 30€1,900-2,400€3,200-4,000
Commercial party boatup to 40€1,500-2,200€3,000-4,200

Prices include skipper, crew where applicable, fuel for a standard 12 NM coastal cruise, ice tubs, Bluetooth speaker and standard inflatables. For broader pricing context across all boat types, see how much it costs to rent a boat in Marbella.

Standard 4-hour party itinerary

  1. 14:00 Boarding at Puerto Banús, ice loaded, drinks chilled, BYO stowed.
  2. 14:30 Cast off, cruise west towards Estepona along the Golden Mile.
  3. 15:15 Anchor at Río Verde or off Marbella Club, swim ladder down, donut and SUP launched.
  4. 15:45 Skipper opens the music — DJ takes over if booked.
  5. 16:30 Optional tender to a beach club, or push further east to Cabopino.
  6. 17:30 Cruise back to Puerto Banús, slow lap of the harbour mouth for photos.
  7. 18:00 Disembark, taxis or walk to dinner.

Stag and hen specifics

Stag and hen weekends in Marbella usually combine the boat party with one of three add-ons:

  • Jet-ski session tied to the charter — skipper coordinates pickup, €60–€90/person.
  • Beach club entry at Nikki Beach, Ocean Club or Sala Beach — the boat tenders the group ashore, you spend 90 minutes, then re-board. Beach club entry is separate (€50–€150 minimum spend per head).
  • Catering on board — paella party, sushi platter or full hot lunch. €30–€80 per head, 24 h notice.

For a quieter group experience that's more day-out than party, the yacht charter Marbella page covers standard private charters.

What you can and can't do

Yes: BYO alcohol on private charters, loud music at anchor outside marina limits, jumping off the boat at the anchor stop, costume changes on board, inflatable swans, drone photography (your own pilot). No: glass on deck (cans and plastic only on most boats), confetti or anything that ends up in the water (Spanish marina fines are punishing), open flames (no shisha or candles), drugs (the skipper will return to port and the deposit is forfeit). Spanish maritime alcohol law applies to the skipper, not guests — but be sensible.

Best months for a Marbella boat party

Late June through early September is peak — water at 22–24 °C, long daylight, the marina scene at full volume. July is the busiest single month. Mid-September keeps the warmth and drops the price 10–15%. May, June and October work for groups happy with 19–21 °C water (swims are shorter but everything else still flies). Outside that window party charters still run but the on-deck temperature won't sustain a long anchor stop.

Booking a boat party

Send a WhatsApp with: date, group size, hen/stag/birthday/corporate, half-day vs full-day, BYO or paid bar preference, and whether you want DJ and beach-club tender included. We send back 2–3 specific boats that fit, with photos, exact pier number at Puerto Banús, and an itemised quote. Book 3–4 weeks ahead for July/August Saturday slots; weekday availability is reasonable up to 5–7 days out.

Frequently asked questions

How much is a boat party in Marbella?

Half-day for 16 guests on a 16 m yacht costs €1,200–€1,800 (€75–€110 per person). Full day on a 22 m party yacht for 25 guests €2,800–€4,500. Larger commercial party boats up to 40 guests from €1,500 for a half-day.

What size group fits on which boat?

Up to 8: 10–12 m motor yacht. 10–16: 16–18 m yacht or 45 ft catamaran. 18–25: 22 m+ yacht or 50 ft commercial catamaran. 25–40: dedicated party boat. Above 40: split into two boats.

Can we BYO alcohol?

Yes on private charters — most operators welcome BYO and provide ice. Cava, prosecco and spirits all fine; cans/plastic only on deck.

What about DJ and music?

Every charter has Bluetooth speakers. Add pro DJ + dedicated system for €350 half-day or €600 full-day. Live saxophonists €400–€600.

Are stag/hen activities included?

Customisable: jet-skis €60/person, beach club tender (entry separate), catering €30–€80 per head with 24 h notice, photographer €200/hour. We coordinate via WhatsApp.
